core_modules.description: Primary forecasting estimator interface (fit/predict/update/predict_interval/predict_quantiles) and lifecycle hooks; central abstraction for most forecasting functionality.
Core transformer API for time-series transformations used across pipelines and composite estimators.
Core time-series classification API and estimator contract.
Core time-series regression API and estimator contract.
Core clustering abstraction for panel/time-series clustering estimators.
Base API for anomaly/change-point/segmentation detection estimators.
Estimator discovery/registry lookup; best entry point for dynamic MCP tool generation and capability introspection.
Built-in dataset loader surface for fast MCP examples/testing without extra integration code.
Forecasting evaluation and tuning primitives suitable for high-value MCP tools.
Forecasting metric functions for evaluation-oriented MCP endpoints.
Composable workflow primitives enabling single-call end-to-end fit/predict tools.
